title: Me-Kwa-Mooks Park: West Seattle – I Just Have to Say…
content: # I Just Have to Say…. # Me-Kwa-Mooks Park: West Seattle. It was the last day of my visit to Seattle. We decided to venture into Me-Kwa-Mooks Park. The entrance to the park is on the east side of Beach Drive in a small clearing with several picnic tables. Like most other parts of West Seattle coastline, this park is located on uphill slopes that end with a rather steep climb up a bluff. The trail is narrow and you have to hunt for it. She also knew that there was a trail that led to the top of the bluff. We made it to the top, mostly because there was no way we were going back down some of the places we had been. It was clearly not everyone’s “walk in the park” and I was a little surprised that it was accessible in this day of lawsuits and litigation.
